unreleased_commits.author: JaredHatfield
unreleased_commits.message:
feat: add InsecureSkipVerify support per backend with per-backend HTTP clients

Move HTTP client from Proxy-level to resolvedBackend-level so each
backend can have its own TLS settings. Add InsecureSkipVerify option
to backend config for self-signed TLS upstreams, with tests for both
OAuth client credentials and proxy forwarding flows.
